steps.title: Write the daily range
steps.content:
The model estimates $68$ to $74$ miles per day, so the daily distance is between those values:
$$68\le \text{daily distance}\le 74$$

steps.title: Scale to thirty one days
steps.content: For $31$ days, multiply the lower and upper daily distances by $31$: $$(68)(31)\le x\le(74)(31)$$ The answer is B.
